title: XK Highlight Block
description: -Added highlighted edges to some blocks, such as budding amethyst, ancient debris, suspicious sand/gravel, powder snow, tripwire, waxed coppers, fence gate.
body:
-Added highlighted edges to some blocks, such as budding amethyst, ancient debris, suspicious sand/gravel, powder snow, tripwire, waxed coppers, fence gate.

-These blocks always require extra attention in survival, but the vanilla texture makes it difficult to distinguish from the environment.

-No X-ray effect, safe for server use.

-Can be paired with other resource packs, textures will merge well.
